calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of Radiance At Mission Bay And Amended And Restated Bylaws Of Radiance Owners Association
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: HEARING ON PETITION TO AUTHORIZE APPROVAL OF AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS OF RADIANCE AT MISSION BAY AND AMENDED AND RESTATED BYLAWS OF RADIANCE OWNERS ASSOCIATION
is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants Conditions And Restrictions Of Radiance At Mission Bay And Amended And Restated Bylaws Of Radiance Owners Association
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO AUTHORIZE APPROVAL OF AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COVENANTS CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS OF RADIANCE AT MISSION BAY AND AMENDED AND RESTATED BYLAWS OF RADIANCE OWNERS ASSOCIATION is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
